factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with the background and lacks dominance.
The product is shown without any context or realistic use scenario.
No specific buyer benefit is communicated in the image.
The image lacks a clear arrangement, making it visually confusing.
The image does not showcase material quality or details effectively.
There are no visible trust signals present in the image.
The image has low contrast and lacks clear boundaries.
The image resembles a generic product listing without campaign elements.
